name: Can I get pain and suffering money for work injury in Murray Utah?
description: No in comp; yes in third-party suit.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I get pain and suffering money for work injury in Murray Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No in comp; yes in third-party suit.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No from comp; yes from third-party negligence suit.[1] Uncapped noneconomic in non-med mal.[1] Key factors: prove fault separately. Liens apply post-recovery.[1] Pursue if viable.
